## ✅ Release Readiness Checklist

### Exit Criteria Assessment

- [ ] **Test Coverage**: All acceptance criteria covered (**Status**: [X]/[TOTAL] ACs)
- [ ] **Pass Rate**: ≥ 95% pass rate (**Current**: [PASS_RATE]%)
- [ ] **Blocker Defects**: 0 open blockers (**Current**: [BLOCKER_COUNT])
- [ ] **Critical Defects**: 0 open critical defects (**Current**: [CRITICAL_COUNT])
- [ ] **Platform Testing**: All platforms tested (**Status**: [PLATFORMS_TESTED]/[TOTAL_PLATFORMS])
- [ ] **Regression Suite**: ≥ 95% regression pass rate (**Current**: [REGRESSION_PASS_RATE]%)
- [ ] **Performance**: All performance SLAs met (**Status**: [✅/❌])
- [ ] **Automation**: ≥ 80% automation coverage (**Current**: [AUTO_COVERAGE]%)

**Overall Readiness**: [X]/[TOTAL] criteria met ([PERCENTAGE]%)
